title: The Otherside
body:
![The Otherside Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c32b4963dc21e06de5be5daf31ca781fc56293f1_0.webp)

You didn't think that your ability to **respawn** would **always work** like clockwork, did you?
Well, with this mod you'll have to give up on that thought, because now you have a chance not to be resurrected in the mortal world, but to get to the **place where death and the Void reign**.
Don't worry, the **Otherside** won't hold you forever, after a certain time you'll still return to the mortal world and continue living as if **nothing had happened**...
There is also another way. You can risk your **lost soul** and try to activate the **Reality Rift**, but don't think that it will be so easy...
Be sure, the **Grim Sentinels** will not let you leave this place until the appointed time.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-Q-BNCqljIk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Idea inspired by [[SFM] Emesis Blue](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V0ODG8bFme0).

This mod is not a continuation/remake of [baronfonshish's The Otherside](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-otherside).

**The Otherside** requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

**Mod reviews:**
- [Russian (v1.0)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NbV3B8fqIhE)

**Supported languages:**
- English
- Russian
- Spanish
- Ukrainian

**[Made with MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/115641/otherside)**

**It's eternity in there...**
